hero.headline: Small batches. Real teachers. Marks follow.
hero.subtext: {{BRAND}} runs classroom coaching the old-fashioned way: 24 students to a batch, a printed study plan on day one, and a fortnightly

items.title: Diagnostic test, week one
items.desc: Before teaching a single chapter, we test what the student already knows. The study plan is adjusted to close their

items.title: Fortnightly progress reports
items.desc: Every two weeks, parents receive a one-page report: chapters covered, test scores, attendance, and one line from the

items.title: Saturday doubt hour
items.desc: An open hour where any student can bring any question, from this week's homework to last year's board paper. Faculty

items.title: Full-length mock series
items.desc: Six mocks on the actual board and entrance patterns, held on Sunday mornings under exam conditions, with answer scripts

about.body: Summit Academy is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.q: How do I enrol in a batch?
items.a: Call or visit — we place you by level after a short assessment.
Yes — notes, practice sets and mock tests are part of the programme.
Individual slots are available outside regular batch hours.

contact.address: Ground Floor, Medical Plaza, Your City
